ns0:entry.ns0:title: MHSanaei/3x-ui
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/MHSanaei/3x-ui
Language: go
Xray panel supporting multi-protocol multi-user expire day & traffic & IP limit (Vmess, Vless, Trojan, ShadowSocks, Wireguard, Hysteria, Tunnel, Mixed, HTTP, Tun, MTProto)

ns0:entry.ns0:title: aquasecurity/trivy
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/aquasecurity/trivy
Language: go
Find vulnerabilities, misconfigurations, secrets, SBOM in containers, Kubernetes, code repositories, clouds and more

ns0:entry.ns0:title: binwiederhier/ntfy
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/binwiederhier/ntfy
Language: go
Send push notifications to your phone or desktop using PUT/POST

ns0:entry.ns0:title: bluenviron/mediamtx
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/bluenviron/mediamtx
Language: go
Ready-to-use Media-over-QUIC / SRT / WebRTC / RTSP / RTMP / LL-HLS / MPEG-TS / RTP live media server and media proxy that allows to read, publish, proxy, record and playback real-time video and audio streams.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: cli/cli
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/cli/cli
Language: go
GitHub’s official command line tool

ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/derailed/k9s
Language: go
🐶 Kubernetes CLI To Manage Your Clusters In Style!

ns0:entry.ns0:title: entireio/cli
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/entireio/cli
Language: go
📜 Entire CLI hooks into your Git workflow to capture AI agent sessions as you work. Sessions are indexed alongside commits, creating a searchable record of how code was written in your repo.

ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/jesseduffield/lazydocker

ns0:entry.ns0:title: knadh/listmonk
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/knadh/listmonk
Language: go
High performance, self-hosted, newsletter and mailing list manager with a modern dashboard. Single binary app.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: mark3labs/mcp-go
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/mark3labs/mcp-go
Language: go
A Go implementation of the Model Context Protocol (MCP), enabling seamless integration between LLM applications and external data sources and tools.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: microsoft/typescript-go
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/microsoft/typescript-go
Language: go

ns0:entry.ns0:title: netdata/netdata
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/netdata/netdata
Language: go
The fastest path to AI-powered full stack observability, even for lean teams.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: ory/kratos
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/ory/kratos
Language: go
Headless cloud-native authentication and identity management written in Go. Scales to a billion+ users. Replace Homegrown, Auth0, Okta, Firebase with better UX and DX. Passkeys, Social Sign In, OIDC, Magic Link, Multi-Factor Auth, SMS, SAML, TOTP, and more. Runs everywhere, runs best on Ory Network.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: prometheus/node_exporter
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/prometheus/node_exporter
Language: go
Exporter for machine metrics

ns0:entry.ns0:content:

Language: go
Information gathering framework for phone numbers
